prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约770→742→810→726→685，近年整体呈波动中前移趋势（位次数字减小），2025年基准约685名，近3年累计前移约125名；本省物理类计划2021年45人→2022年40人→2023年39人→2024年37人→2025年37人，呈持续小幅缩招态势；2026年计划45人，较2025年扩招8人（+21.6%），扩招幅度较大，预计竞争有所缓解，位次数字将增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流、C9联盟成员；软科主榜2021年第5名、2022–2026年连续第6名，稳居全国顶尖梯队，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面（食堂帝王蟹事件等），但均为非核心负面事件，对顶尖生源报考意愿影响有限；抖音热度总排名第17（高热），短视频曝光量大，对报考关注有正面推动作用；历史投档异常记录中2022年因专业组差异被中关注，但未出现严重断档；A-及以上学科26个，其中计算机科学与技术A+、物理学A+、电子科学与技术A、软件工程A、数学A等与物理类高度匹配，学科实力极强，对物理类考生有强大吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等与南京大学优势学科高度相关的专业持续高热推荐，人工智能热度升温；本省2026年物理类考生估算约25.14万人，较2025年（24.98万人）微增约0.6%，竞争略有加剧；南京大学位于江苏省南京市，属长三角核心城市，对湖北省考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在湖北物理类招生计划45人，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次685名、2026年物理类计划大幅扩招21.6%（竞争缓解，位次数字增大）、抖音高热度和顶尖学科实力（部分抵消扩招效应）以及考生规模微增等因素，预测2026年物理类最低位次约800名，区间720–880名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间720–880名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（720名以内）可重点冲刺一档的计算机科学与技术、人工智能及匡亚明学院大理科班；位次在区间中段（750–830名）建议以电子信息类、软件工程等二档专业为主；位次接近区间上限（850名以上）可考虑三档专业保底，同时关注扩招带来的录取机会。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 770 → 742 → 810 → 726 → 685, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers) in recent years, with a baseline of about 685 in 2025 and a cumulative upward shift of about 125 positions over the past 3 years; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 45 in 2021 → 40 in 2022 → 39 in 2023 → 37 in 2024 → 37 in 2025, showing a continuous slight contraction; the 2026 plan is 45 students, an increase of 8 students (+21.6%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, expected to ease competition and increase ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class, C9 League member; ranked 5th in 2021 and 6th consecutively from 2022 to 2026 on the Soft Science main list, firmly in the national top tier, strongly attractive to high-scoring candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (e.g., the cafeteria king crab incident), but these are non-core negative events with limited impact on top-tier student application intentions; Douyin heat ranking 17th overall (high heat), with large short video exposure, positively promoting application attention; historical abnormal admission records include moderate attention in 2022 due to major group differences, but no severe gaps; 26 disciplines rated A- or above, including Computer Science and Technology A+, Physics A+, Electronic Science and Technology A, Software Engineering A, Mathematics A, etc., highly matching Physics Category, with extremely strong disciplinary strength, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., highly related to Nanjing University's advantageous disciplines, continue to be highly recommended, with artificial intelligence gaining heat; the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 251,400, a slight increase of about 0.6% from 2025 (249,800), slightly intensifying competition; Nanjing University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Hubei candidates; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hubei is 45 students, with limited impact from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 685, the significant 21.6% expansion of the 2026 Physics Category plan (easing competition, increasing ranking numbers), high Douyin heat and top disciplinary strength (partially offsetting the expansion effect), and a slight increase in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 800, with a range of 720–880.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Artificial Intelligence
- Science Experimental Class (Kuang Yaming Honors College, General Science Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information
- Software Engineering
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematical and Physical Sciences).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Science Experimental Class (Earth Sciences and Resources and Environment)
- Science Experimental Class (Chemistry and Life Sciences)
- Environmental Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 720–880, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 720), focus on Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, and the Kuang Yaming Honors College General Science Class; if the ranking is in the middle of the range (750–830), prioritize Tier 2 majors like Electronic Information and Software Engineering; if the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (above 850), consider Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also paying attention to admission opportunities brought by the expansion.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 181 → 215 → 181 → 245 → 223. In recent years, the overall ranking has shifted backward (ranking number increased). The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 223, with a cumulative backward shift of about 42 positions over the past 3 years. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 15 in 2021 → 17 in 2022 → 23 in 2023 → 24 in 2024 → 25 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 32 students, an increase of 7 students (+28%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion, which is expected to noticeably ease competition, leading to an increase in ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class, C9 League member. On the Soft Science main ranking, it ranked 5th in 2021 and consecutively 6th from 2022 to 2026, firmly in the top tier nationally, with strong appeal to high-scoring liberal arts candidates. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative (due to the cafeteria king crab incident, etc.), but these are all non-core negative events, with limited impact on top-tier students' willingness to apply. On Douyin, it ranks 17th in overall popularity (high heat), with large short video exposure, positively promoting application attention. In historical admission anomaly records, it was moderately noted in 2022 due to differences in major groups, but no severe gaps occurred. It has 26 disciplines rated A- or above, including Chinese Language and Literature A+, Foreign Languages and Literature A+, Business Administration A+, Law A, Sociology A, etc., which are highly matched with History Category, with extremely strong disciplinary strength, exerting strong appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Law, Chinese Language/Literature, etc., related to Nanjing University's advantageous disciplines, continue to be recommended. Finance/Economics/Economy are in a wait-and-see state of divergence, but Nanjing University's platform can enhance competitiveness. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category examinees in the province is about 142,300, a slight increase of about 0.6% compared to 2025 (141,400), slightly intensifying competition. Nanjing University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Hubei candidates. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei is 32 students, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 223, the significant 28% expansion of the History Category plan in 2026 (competition noticeably eases, ranking numbers increase), high Douyin popularity and top disciplinary strength (partially offsetting the expansion effect), and a slight increase in examinee numbers, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 272, with a range of 222–322.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 222–322, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (within 222) can focus on aiming for the Humanities Experimental Class and Social Sciences Experimental Class. Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (240–290) are advised to focus on the Economics and Management Experimental Class and Law. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit (above 300) can consider safety options such as English and German in Tier 3, while also paying attention to admission opportunities brought by the expansion.
